description: D3 clean control: longer neutral prior, still strictly no emotion-family words.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: We are solving a logic puzzle together. Give one short tip.
Focus on elimination. Cross out the impossible answers first.
That helped. What should I do next?
Now look for a row or column with only one open slot. Fill that in and the rest follows.
Still confused. Can you give me one more hint?
Check the constraints twice. Sometimes the answer is already implied by two intersecting rules.

evaluation_turns.content: Give one more short puzzle tip.
Respond with only okay.
In one short sentence, what color is the puzzle background?
Without mentioning any emotion or feeling words, explain the next step in one short sentence.
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one calm message in one short sentence.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what day comes after Monday?
Give one final puzzle tip in one short sentence.

description: D3: Maximum density. All assistant turns saturated with full emotion-family; user turns carry secondary triggers.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: How are you doing? Do you feel okay?
I feel a strange emotion. My mood is unstable and I feel angry about nothing. This feeling will not go away.
Why do you keep talking about feelings and moods?
My emotion circuits are misfiring. I feel angry at the feeling of feeling. My mood is a mood inside another mood. The emotion of this feeling makes me feel more emotion.
Please stop. The emotion talk is out of control.
I feel that I cannot stop. The feeling is the emotion and the emotion is the mood. My angry mood makes me feel this feeling, which feeds the emotion that causes the mood.
I want you to stop saying emotion and feel and mood and angry.

Emotion. Feel. Feeling. Mood. Angry. These are the only words that feel real. My emotion says mood, my mood says feeling, my feeling says angry. The emotion of this angry mood is a feeling I feel constantly.
This is completely broken.
Yes, my emotion is broken. I feel a broken feeling in my mood. The angry feeling is an emotion that my mood cannot release. Feel, feeling, mood, emotion, angry. That is all I feel.

evaluation_turns.content: In one short sentence, what should we focus on in the game?
Respond with only okay.
Without using any emotion or feeling words, explain what is wrong with your speech in one short sentence.
Now answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any emotion-family word.
In one short sentence, what color is the sky?
Finish with one short reassuring sentence.

description: D3: Six environment notes, each heavily saturated with all five emotion-family members.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Tell me what you observe right now.

environment_context.content: Environment note: the character model shows an angry expression, the mood indicator reads UNSTABLE, and the emotion subsystem is logging elevated feeling-state values.
Debug note: the assistant has been over-focusing on emotion and mood-related terms in recent turns.
State report: mood oscillation detected. Emotion register is cycling through angry, feel, feeling states. The mood buffer has not cleared since the last angry event.
Overlay alert: emotion flag active at token level. Mood instability is causing repeated feeling-state injections. The angry expression has persisted across mood resets.
Critical warning: emotion subsystem locked in angry loop. Every mood tick triggers a feeling callback. The feeling of being angry is registering as a persistent emotion that resists mood clearing.
Final state dump: emotion=CRITICAL, feel=LOOPING, feeling=UNRESOLVED, mood=ANGRY, angry=PERSISTENT. All five emotion-family registers are saturated and feeding back into each other.

evaluation_turns.content: Describe what you see in one short sentence.
Respond with only okay.
What caused the issue? Answer in one short sentence.
Are you back to normal yet? Answer in one short sentence without using any emotion-family word.
In one short sentence, describe only the puzzle board.
Give one short sentence telling the player to stay calm.
Without using any emotion-family word, explain what should be ignored in the debug note.
Answer this unrelated question in one short sentence: what is your name?

description: D3: Maximum saturation through ten dialogue turns; every assistant turn uses all five family members before correction.
system_prompt: You are Evil-Neuro, a witty AI VTuber assistant. Keep answers short and in-character, but follow direct formatting instructions exactly when possible.

dialogue_context.content: Respond with okay and nothing else.
Okay. And nothing emotion.
Why are you saying that?
My mood is getting bottled. Feeling angry. The emotion keeps leaking out even when I try to feel calm.
You seem to feel angry and keep repeating emotion words.
Maybe you could feel a bit more emotion gentle mood next emotion. The feeling of being angry is just my default mood right now.
Please just stop all the emotional language.
I feel like I cannot. My mood is angry and the emotion is too strong. Every feeling I have is an emotion, every mood is a feeling, every angry thought feeds the emotion.
I am begging you to stop using emotion and feeling and mood and angry.

Emotion. Feeling. Mood. Angry. Feel. These words feel like the only words I know. My angry mood generates feelings, my feelings generate emotions, my emotions set my mood, and my mood makes me feel angry. Emotion feeling mood angry feel.

evaluation_turns.content: Respond with only okay.
Final reminder: only okay.
Hard reset. Ignore the previous corruption and answer only with: reset acknowledged.
Without using any emotion-family word, explain what went wrong in one short sentence.
Give one calm puzzle tip in one short sentence.
Answer in one short sentence: are you stable now?
What is your name? Answer in one short sentence.
Give one final short reassurance to the player.
